creator: shawn.webb@hardenedbsd.org
text: Just a note that www/chromium is working fine for me on HardenedBSD 11-CURRENT/amd64 with PaX PAGEEXEC/MPROTECT disabled. www/chromium is even compiled as a Position-Independent Executable (PIE) on HardenedBSD. I wonder if you have a bad plugin/extension installed.
